comment.body:
"For the opening, watch 6111, at which side the momentum will be (seems unbreakable from any side after 1.50pm). If below, the momentum is likely to get pinned to the centroid. If above, then the upside pivot is 6124.73 (especially crucial into the powerhour), and can easily result in a pin to 6140, coding 6145 as main resistance for today. But if local vol catches up, I code 6160 then pin back to 6140"

That was spot on and helped me put on a solid trade
